details.note: Changed DesktopHostSlotMap[Name] to (DesktopHostSlotMap & Slots)[Name] to resolve TS2344/TS2536 when Name is a key from Slots not in DesktopHostSlotMap
Added import type { DesktopPlugin } from ./desktop.js and import type { TuiPlugin } from ./tui.js before the re-export, fixing TS2552/TS2304
